## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] style — formatting, no logic change
- [ ] refactor — code restructure, no behaviour change
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests
- [ ] chore — build, config, tooling

## Related area

- [ ] Backend (Node.js / Express / SQLite)
- [ ] Frontend (HTML / CSS / JS)
- [ ] Odoo Module (Python / XML)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / Deployment

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] No hardcoded data or credentials in the code
- [ ] All API calls go through `api.js` (frontend changes)
- [ ] DB queries use parameterised statements (backend changes)
- [ ] `node test_api.js` still passes (if backend changed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
